features: Unique Design for DJ: We are passionate about DJ headphones, FUSION A71 headphones implements swiveling earcups, comfortable headband, hi-fi stereo sound, portability and features reversible housing and a rugged adjustable headband for free-style and single-side monitoring . Moreover, we also created a jack lock system, so no matter how much movement there is, the cable will not get off the headphones' port. This is a great plus for DJs and musicians.

Dual-duty Cable & Adapter-free: This is a unique cable, one of the ends there is a 3.5mm jack and on the other end there is a 6.3mm jack. This great feature allows free exchange and most importantly: it's adapter-free! Perfect for mixers, electric guitars, keyboards, and more.Dual-duty cable our solution for an adapter-free life--- there are gold-plated 3 5mm & 6 3mm plugs on each end of the audio cable just simply plug in according to your needs and no more trouble finding a single adapter.

Superior Hi-Fi Sound Quality: Enjoy clear sound and powerful and stylish high definition stereo with FUSION A71 headphones. 40mm large-aperture drivers deliver riveting sound and a thumping bass. It is designed for stereo headphones. Offering clear, natural, and balanced audio quality that’s decent for most music genres.

Unmatched Wearing Comfort & Foldable Design: The oval earpad design with pressure-relieving cushions has been engineered to match the shape of your ears, ensuring a secure fit with minimal sound leakage.The headband is adjustable and stretchable .Ultra thick earpads with seamless 3D sewing seal in sound, reflecting acoustics back towards your ears. As a result, you’ll hear more of your music with less outside interference. It is specifically suitables for monitor and DJ.
Widely Compatible: Works with iOS, Android and many other Audio devices. High-quality sound, supreme durability, and maximum comfort. These are the headphones you've been looking for.
description: Product Description Hi-Res Audio Certified Hear music with Hi-Res audio compatibility, and enjoy the ultimate sound quality and original sound reproduction. OnoOdio A71 Studio Recording Headphones Previous page Bass Sound Powerful bass, clear vocal, and crisp high tones form a stereo sound. Comfortable & Multifunctional Over-ear Headphones Whether you own a home studio, or even if you work only from an internet cafe, they will allow you to work at any time without disturbing anyone else in the room. An Absolute Essential Choice for Podcasting With its padded ear cushions and adjustable headband, this set of headphones lets you comfortably record a podcast for hours on end. Next page Why Choose OneOdio A71 Hi-Res Studio Recording Headphones? Previous page Luxurious Earmuff, Feel the Comfort Dual Headphone Jacks They have 3.5 and 6.35-millimeter jack ports included to fit various audio sources such as AMP, guitar, e-drum, speakers, mixers, or instruments. Jack Lock & Inline Mic Design For ensuring a secure connection, we add a jack lock system on the stereo Aux cable. Also, you can use the mic button to pause or play music, and you can use it to answer or end a call.
